title: Clarify file-scoped module declarations in platform guides

source.subject: docs: clarify file-scoped module declarations and their implications

body:
## Outcome

Clarify file-scoped module declarations and their implications.

## Context

- Workstream **platform-spec** — normative spec on beskid-lang.org.

## Provenance
